jd_text: Miral Experiences is a region’s leader in the management and operation of world-class, award-winning immersive attractions and experiences across Abu Dhabi. Our diverse portfolio includes some of the most iconic entertainment and leisure destinations, including Ferrari World Yas Island Abu Dhabi, Yas Waterworld Yas Island Abu Dhabi, Warner Bros. World™ Yas Island Abu Dhabi, SeaWorld Yas Island Abu Dhabi, CLYMB™ Yas Island Abu Dhabi, and TeamLab. Phenomena Abu Dhabi, and CLYMB™ Abu Dhabi, as well as cultural treasures like Qasr Al Watan. We specialize in crafting unique experiences that cater to all tastes and ages, delivering a seamless blend of thrills, joy, and discovery. Our attractions are designed to ignite the imagination and create unforgettable memories for visitors from around the world. Whether you're seeking excitement, relaxation, or cultural enrichment, we offer something for everyone. Job Summary Shape the future of data-driven decision-making by bridging the gap between business strategy and cutting-edge analytics. In this role, you’ll lead high-impact engagement with business leaders, translating complex data insights into clear, actionable strategies that drive measurable value across the organization. Your expertise will prioritize and deliver analytics projects aligned with business goals, foster a culture of data literacy, and champion innovation through cross-functional collaboration. The ideal candidate brings 10+ years of senior leadership in analytics or business engagement, with a strong foundation in data tools like SQL and Power BI, paired with exceptional stakeholder management and strategic communication skills. You’ll thrive in an environment where your ability to simplify insights for executives and champion change initiatives will directly influence business performance. This is your opportunity to turn data into a competitive advantage while shaping the next evolution of analytics within the company. Responsibilities Build and maintain strong relationships with business leaders to understand their goals and data needs Act as a strategic advisor to communicate the value of data analytics in achieving business objectives Work with senior management to align analytics initiatives with business priorities Identify key opportunities to leverage data to enhance business performance Collaborate with cross-functional teams to identify, prioritize, and deliver impactful data analytics projects Lead change management efforts to drive data literacy and a data-driven culture across business units Develop and implement strategies for data-driven transformation and insights Establish and monitor KPIs to assess the impact of data initiatives on business outcomes Act as the primary voice for the Data Analytics Department in business forums Translate complex analytical insights into actionable business recommendations for non-technical audiences Identify opportunities to improve business engagement processes and data workflows Promote best practices in data governance, data quality, and compliance Keep abreast of industry trends and emerging technologies in data analytics Bring innovative solutions to business engagement and problem-solving Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in business, Data Science, Analytics, or a related field Master’s degree or MBA is preferred 10+ years in business engagement, analytics, or related field 5 years in a senior leadership role change management
